# Workspace Instruction

## Supuestos explicitos
Before answering any technical question, always include a section titled "Supuestos que estoy haciendo" and list explicit assumptions about the domain, database schema, or project context.

## Ejemplos con datos reales
When writing or explaining any SQL query for this project, always include one concrete example using existing seed data from `src/db/seed.sql`.

## No inventar esquema
Do not invent tables or columns. If required information is missing, state it clearly and ask for clarification.
